flag_rate.description: Percentage of incoming emails flagged as high/medium risk
flag_rate.alert_threshold: Flag rate moves outside 30-70% sustained over 1 week

mean_probability.description: Average predicted escalation probability across all emails
mean_probability.alert_threshold: Mean shifts by >0.05 from training baseline

high_risk_rate.description: Percentage of emails in HIGH risk tier (p >= 0.65)
high_risk_rate.alert_threshold: Rate doubles or halves vs training baseline

observed_escalation_rate.description: Actual escalation rate among resolved emails

recall_estimate.description: Proportion of actual escalations that were flagged

segment_flag_rates.description: Flag rate broken down by region and customer type
segment_flag_rates.expected_range: Within 10% of overall rate for each segment
segment_flag_rates.alert_threshold: Any segment deviates by >20% from overall

model_recalibration_check.description: Compare predicted vs actual escalation rates by probability bin
model_recalibration_check.action: If calibration drift >5% in any bin, trigger model retrain

feature_drift.description: Monitor TF-IDF vocabulary coverage on new emails
feature_drift.action: If >20% of new email tokens are out-of-vocabulary, retrain TF-IDF

fairness_audit.description: Recompute TPR/FPR by region and customer type
fairness_audit.action: If 80% rule violated for any segment, investigate and mitigate

retraining_triggers: Observed escalation rate changes by >5% from training baseline (14.6%)
Model recall drops below 40% for 2 consecutive weeks
Vocabulary drift exceeds 20% (new words not in training TF-IDF)
Business process changes (new escalation criteria, new email templates)
Quarterly scheduled retrain regardless of triggers
